error_page_not_found: The requested page was not found.
search_aria: Search by city, postal code, studio or yoga style
search_placeholder: City, postal code, studio or style…
city_search_aria: Search school, style, district or postal code
listing_price_estimated_title: Estimated price based on class packages (3x/week)
listing_claim_text: Is this your studio? Claim your profile and stand out among local yoga schools — for free.
listing_claim_text_warsaw: Is this your studio? Claim your profile and stand out among Warsaw yoga schools — for free.
schedule_stale: Schedule may be outdated — last classes are in the past.
schedule_preparing_text: We're working on automatically fetching the class schedule for this studio. The schedule will appear on this page soon.
schedule_unavailable: Class schedule is not yet available for this studio.
claim_subtitle: Fill out the form to take over the profile of {name}. We will verify your identity and contact you within 2 business days.
claim_success_text: Thank you! Your request regarding {name} has been saved. We will contact you within 2 business days to verify your identity.
claim_message_placeholder: E.g. link to studio website confirming your affiliation...
claim_step_3: You get full control over the profile
claim_free_note: Claiming a profile is free and comes with no obligations.
about_meta_desc: szkolyjogi.pl is a directory of yoga schools in Poland — compare prices, styles and locations in one place.
about_mission_p1: szkolyjogi.pl is an independent database of yoga schools in Poland. It was created out of a simple need: we wanted one place to check current prices and schedules without clicking through dozens of cluttered websites.
about_mission_p2: Our goal is to remove information noise. We organize scattered data so you can focus on what matters — practice.
about_owners_p1: Your school is probably already in our catalog. You can claim your profile for free to update your schedule, add photos and a description.
about_owners_p2: Questions or want to add a new studio? Write to us: joga@zaur.app.
terms_meta_desc: Terms of service for szkolyjogi.pl — yoga school directory in Poland.
terms_s1_1: The website szkolyjogi.pl (hereinafter: "Service") is a directory of yoga schools operating in Poland.
terms_s1_2: The Service is administered by szkolyjogi.pl.
terms_s1_3: Use of the Service is free of charge.
terms_s2_1: The Service provides information about yoga schools, including: names, addresses, pass prices, yoga styles, class schedules and contact details.
terms_s2_2: Information presented in the Service is for informational purposes only and may not reflect the current state of a school's offer.
terms_s2_3: The Service does not mediate class bookings or payments between users and yoga schools.
terms_s3_1: Yoga school data is collected automatically from publicly available sources.
terms_s3_2: A yoga studio owner can claim their school's profile by contacting the administrator at joga@zaur.app.
terms_s3_3: The administrator makes efforts to keep the presented data up to date, but does not guarantee its accuracy.
terms_s4_1: The administrator is not responsible for content posted by yoga schools that have claimed their profiles.
terms_s4_2: The administrator is not responsible for decisions made based on information presented in the Service.
terms_s5_text: For matters related to the Service, please contact us at joga@zaur.app.
post_meta_desc: Add or claim your yoga studio profile in the szkolyjogi.pl directory — for free.
post_already_text: We automatically collect data about yoga schools in Poland. There's a good chance your studio is already here. Search for it on the home page, then click "Claim this profile" on the studio page.
post_not_found_text: Write to us at joga@zaur.app with the name and address of your studio — we'll add it to the directory.
post_benefit_1_text: Your studio appears in search results and on the city page.
post_benefit_2_text: Edit description, schedule, photos and contact details at any time.
post_benefit_3_text: The directory is free — no hidden fees or time limits.
cal_all_done_today: All classes for today are done
meta_city_desc: Yoga school directory: {city}. Check reviews, compare monthly pass prices and find the best studio with free trial classes. Listing of {count} schools.
meta_main_desc: Directory of yoga schools in Poland — find a school in your city.
